scenario: Customer Support Agent for an E-Commerce Platform
description: An agent that helps customers with order inquiries, returns, account management, and product questions. Tools interact with backend systems but should NOT be called during casual conversation.

tools.name: lookup_order
tools.description: Look up order details by order ID. Returns order status, items, shipping info, and payment summary.
tools.returns: Order details including status, items, shipping address, and total

tools.name: initiate_return
tools.description: Start a return process for a specific order. Requires order ID and reason. Only works for orders delivered within the last 30 days.

order_id.description: The order ID to return (format: ORD-XXXXX)

items.description: List of item SKUs to return. If empty, returns entire order.

tools.name: check_inventory
tools.description: Check if a product is currently in stock. Returns availability and estimated restock date if out of stock.

warehouse_region.description: Warehouse region to check. Defaults to nearest.

tools.returns: Stock availability, quantity, and estimated delivery time

tools.name: update_shipping_address
tools.description: Update the shipping address for an order that has not yet shipped.
tools.returns: Confirmation of address update or error if order already shipped

tools.name: get_customer_profile
tools.description: Retrieve customer profile information including order history summary, loyalty tier, and preferences.
tools.returns: Customer profile with name, tier, order count, and preferences

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: Transfer the conversation to a human support agent. Use only when the issue cannot be resolved automatically.

reason.description: Brief description of why escalation is needed

context_summary.description: Summary of the conversation so far for the human agent

tools.returns: Escalation ticket number and estimated wait time
